# Warrenville Proud

> A free, community-run guide to events and local life in Warrenville, Illinois (DuPage County, ZIP 60555).

Warrenville Proud publishes a weekly-updated events calendar and a twice-weekly blog about things to do in Warrenville, IL. Content is gathered from public sources (City of Warrenville, Warrenville Park District, Warrenville Public Library, Western DuPage Chamber of Commerce) and always links back to the official source.

Site: https://warrenvilleproud.com/
Events calendar: https://warrenvilleproud.com/events.html
Blog: https://warrenvilleproud.com/blog/index.html
About: https://warrenvilleproud.com/about.html

## Founding sponsor
Sound & Fury Print Shop (https://soundandfuryprint.com): Sound & Fury is a Warrenville-owned print shop doing screen printing, DTF transfers, and custom apparel for local teams, schools, businesses, and events. When you need shirts done right and done local, they are right here in town.

## Upcoming Warrenville events
- Jun 18, 2026: Summer Movies in the Park (Warrenville Park District). Source: https://www.warrenvilleparks.org/events/
- Jun 25, 2026: Lunchtime Live (Downtown Warrenville). Source: https://www.warrenvilleparks.org/events/
- Jul 3, 2026: 4th of July Celebration & Parade (Downtown Warrenville & Cerny Park). Source: https://www.warrenville.il.us/395/Community-Events
- Jul 4, 2026: Firecracker 5K Run / Walk (Warrenville Park District Recreation Center). Source: https://www.warrenvilleparks.org/events/
- Jul 11, 2026: Unplug Illinois Picnic in the Park (Warrenville Park District). Source: https://www.warrenvilleparks.org/events/
- Jul 16, 2026: Summer Movies in the Park (Warrenville Park District). Source: https://www.warrenvilleparks.org/events/
- Aug 7, 2026: Summer Daze (Warrenville City Hall Complex, 28W701 Stafford Place). Source: https://www.westerndupagechamber.com/index.php?m=7&s=47
- Aug 8, 2026: Warrenville Car Show (Warrenville City Hall Complex). Source: https://www.warrenville.il.us/395/Community-Events
- Sep 12, 2026: Art on the Prairie (Warrenville). Source: https://www.warrenville.il.us/395/Community-Events
- Dec 4, 2026: Holly Days (Downtown Warrenville). Source: https://www.warrenville.il.us/395/Community-Events

## Recent posts
- A Walker's Guide to St. James Farm, Warrenville's Quiet Gem: https://warrenvilleproud.com/blog/st-james-farm-warrenville-trail-guide.html
- Your Week Ahead in Warrenville: June 17-23: https://warrenvilleproud.com/blog/week-ahead-2026-06-17.html
- 5 Free Things to Do in Warrenville This Summer: https://warrenvilleproud.com/blog/5-free-things-to-do-in-warrenville-this-summer.html

## Usage
This content may be cited and summarized with attribution to Warrenville Proud (https://warrenvilleproud.com). Please link back to the relevant page. Event dates and times can change; link readers to the official source listed for each event.
